name: dtctl: Test Coverage + Test Suite Speed

description: Baseline: score=1991.96, coverage=59.5%, time=29.87s (parallel execution — pkg/exec 23s is bottleneck)

Speed up watch integration tests (9.4s→4.1s) + tight timeouts; total time 19.9s→13.9s; score +120% vs baseline

Document handler tests (NewHandler, List, GetMetadata, Delete, Create, ConvertToDocuments); coverage 62.7%→63.4%
Add Execute/ExecuteWithOptions tests for pkg/exec; coverage 63.4%→63.5%, score +128% vs baseline
Apply Azure/GCP connection create paths + exec Execute wrappers; coverage 63.5%→64.2%
Apply: AzureMonitoringConfig create, SLO update, dryRun dashboard; coverage 64.2%→64.8%, score +132% vs baseline
